subject: A green-skinned goblin artisan seated at a cluttered workbench, carefully examining a red masquerade mask through a jeweler's loupe, surrounded by shelves of finished masks
description: A goblin with green skin sits hunched at a low workbench in what appears to be a small artisan's workshop. The goblin holds a red mask — the kind used at masquerade balls or theatrical performances — and inspects it closely through a jeweler's loupe held to one eye. The goblin wears a cloth cap, an apron, and is surrounded by the tools of craft: yarn balls, scissors, and thread are scattered around. Shelves on the right hold multiple finished masks in white and other tones — some skull-shaped, some theatrical. A window at left provides soft ambient light. The scene is cozy and detailed, with a warm workshop-interior atmosphere. Bare goblin feet are visible, adding to the character's informal, absorbed-in-work quality.
foreground: goblin artisan examining a red masquerade mask through a loupe, workbench with craft materials
background: mask-lined shelves, workshop window, soft indoor light
emotion: absorbed concentration — squinting through loupe, completely focused on the mask
